name: raise a majin
description: Amidst the echoes of lost aspirations, an artist, once solitary, stumbles upon a whimsical encounter with a Majin creature – the feline manifestation of Majin Buu. The path ahead is fraught with decisions, steering the course between forging an endearing companion or awakening a cosmic nightmare. Navigate the narrative with caution, embracing mischief, cultivating a love for anime (except Dragon Ball), and delicately avoiding the reawakening of the destructive Kid Buu within. How will you shape this extraordinary journey? 🐱✨
creator: Majin_kun
